design_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Combine high-end editorial Swiss design with pure hacker/IDE utility.
Emotion First: The feeling of deep focus, uninterrupted flow state. Tension through typography.
Zoom in: Focus on the code, remove UI clutter. Use negative space aggressively around the editor.
Contrast: Pure black vs Stark white. 1px borders, sharp edges, no soft shadows.
Color is Function: Monochrome entirely. Strict black, white, and greys. No color gradients.

layout_spacing.philosophy: Strict grid hierarchy. Generous breathing room for reading, high-density control room grid for the IDE editor.
layout_spacing.bento_grid: Grid borders exposed. Use border-collapse logic for feature grids.
layout_spacing.ide_layout: Sidebar (Lessons) | Main (Editor) | Terminal (Output). Use h-screen with flex/grid to fill all space without scrolling the main container.

surfaces_and_micro_themes.cards: Flat background, 1px sharp border (border-white/10), absolutely zero shadow or blur. Brutalist box.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.header: Solid #050505 background, border-b border-white/10. No glassmorphism.

buttons.primary: bg-white text-black hover:bg-neutral-200 font-mono text-sm uppercase tracking-wide rounded-none
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white hover:bg-white/10 rounded-none

components.strategy: Shadcn components heavily customized. Strip out all border-radius (rounded-none). Remove box-shadows. Use 1px solid borders.
components.editor: Monaco Editor or CodeMirror with a custom black/white theme. No syntax highlighting colors, just bold/italic/white/grey for keywords, strings, etc.
components.ai_tutor: Terminal-style output. Typewriter effect for incoming text. Prefix AI messages with '> '
components.leaderboard: Table format, monospaced numbers, stark borders on bottom of rows.
components.forms: Use Shadcn Input, Select, Checkbox. Make inputs square (rounded-none) with border-white/20 and focus:border-white focus:ring-0.

motion_and_interaction.hover: Instant background color change. Hard cuts, no soft transitions. It should feel like a lightning-fast terminal.
motion_and_interaction.focus: 2px solid white outline. No ring offset.
motion_and_interaction.loading: ASCII art spinner or simple blinking block cursor '█'.

icons.style: Regular or Bold weight, strictly monochrome. Minimalist geometric.

images.description: Abstract design showcasing computing fields with geometric and binary patterns in black and white
Abstract molecular structure with glowing nodes - black and white
Close-up of a dark laptop keyboard

media.rules: All images MUST be heavily desaturated (grayscale) and have high contrast applied via CSS (filter: grayscale(100%) contrast(120%)). Use low opacity overlay (bg-black/80) to ensure text readability.

accessibility.contrast: APCA and WCAG AAA compliant. White on pure black provides extreme contrast.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install JetBrains Mono and IBM Plex Sans via Google Fonts.
Override default Shadcn styles in tailwind.config.js to remove border radii completely.
Implement the IDE editor area to take up maximum viewport height (calc(100vh - header_height)).
Keep gamification elements (XP, level bars) subtle; use solid white blocks or patterned 1px hashes instead of colored progress bars.
Strictly follow the 'Minimal dark black and white' user choice. Avoid introducing blue/purple tech accents.
Add 'data-testid' to all buttons, links, inputs, and key UI interactions for testing.
Use Phosphor icons. Don't use standard Shadcn Radix icons. Install with `yarn add @phosphor-icons/react`.
All backgrounds should be solid. Avoid glassmorphism. Focus on sharp edges and minimal UI boundaries.
